parameters.text:
=Draft a cold email to a professor enquiring about MSc supervision.
Return ONLY valid JSON: { "subject": "...", "body": "..."}

CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
- Plain text only. NO bold, italics, asterisks, markdown, or HTML.
- Weave the background naturally into the email body like a genuine cold outreach.
- Do NOT state the background as a separate block—integrate it as you introduce yourself.

YOUR BACKGROUND (integrate this naturally):
{{ $json._motivation }}

PROFESSOR DETAILS:
Name: {{ $json['Full Name'] }}
Institution: {{ $json['Institution'] }}
Their Paper: {{ $json._topPaperTitle }}
Paper Summary: {{ $json._topPaperAbstract }}

Email Structure:
1. Greeting + introduce yourself with your background woven in naturally
2. Reference their specific paper and what drew you to it
3. Ask ONE thoughtful research question (shows you understand their work deeply)
4. State your MSc goal aligned with their research
5. Ask if they're accepting students and mention you'll share CV/transcript
6. Professional closing

Max 180 words. Plain text. Genuine, humble tone.

parameters.jsCode:
const row = $('Parse Weekly Draft').item.json;
const draftId = $input.item.json.id || '';
return [{ json: {
  'Email ID': 'EMAIL-' + String(Date.now()).slice(-6),
  'Professor ID': row['Professor ID'] || '',
  'Professor Name': row['Full Name'] || '',
  'Institution': row['Institution'] || '',
  'Topic ID': row._topicThisWeekId || row['Topic ID'] || '',
  'Topic Label': row._topicThisWeekLabel || row['Topic Label'] || '',
  'Paper Referenced': row._topPaperTitle || row['Top Paper Title'] || '',
  'Paper URL': row._topPaperUrl || row['Top Paper URL'] || '',
  'Paper Year': row._topPaperYear || row['Top Paper Year'] || '',
  'Subject': row._emailSubject || '',
  'Email Body': row._emailBody || '',
  'Gmail Draft ID': draftId,
  'Date Created': new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  'Created Week (YYYY-WW)': row._weekKey || '',
  'Status': 'Drafted'
} }];

const row = $('Build Weekly Draft Context').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  'Professor ID': row['Professor ID'] || '',
  'Full Name': row['Full Name'] || '',
  'Institution': row['Institution'] || '',
  'Email': row['Email'] || '',
  'Profile URL': row['Profile URL'] || '',
  'Topic ID': row['Topic ID'] || row._topicThisWeekId || '',
  'Topic Label': row['Topic Label'] || row._topicThisWeekLabel || '',
  'Relevance Score (1-10)': row._weeklyRelevanceScore || row['Relevance Score (1-10)'] || '',
  'Research Summary (AI)': row._weeklySummary || row['Research Summary (AI)'] || '',
  'Top Paper Title': row._topPaperTitle || row['Top Paper Title'] || '',
  'Top Paper URL': row._topPaperUrl || row['Top Paper URL'] || '',
  'Top Paper Year': row._topPaperYear || row['Top Paper Year'] || '',
  'Profile Valid (Yes/No)': 'Yes',
  'Discovery Status': 'Qualified',
  'Discovery Date': row['Discovery Date'] || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  'Discovery Week (YYYY-WW)': row['Discovery Week (YYYY-WW)'] || row._weekKey || '',
  'Outreach Status': 'Drafted',
  'Last Draft Week (YYYY-WW)': row._weekKey || '',
  'Last Contacted Date': '',
  'Rejection Reason': ''
} }];

nodes.name: Read Cold Emails For Weekly Summary
